business.name: Mr. Plumber Macon and Warner Robins
business.tagline: Fast fixes, fair prices, zero drama

hero.headline: Busted pipe? *We're already on the way*
hero.subheadline: Tim and Amanda handle everything from kitchen sinks to emergency leaks — and they actually answer the phone when you call.

services_section.label: THE FIXES
services_section.heading: Every pipe, every problem
services_section.subheading: From toilets that won't flush to mysterious kitchen leaks — we've seen it all

services.title: Emergency Pipe Repairs
services.description: Burst pipes don't wait for business hours. Neither do we. Fast response when water is everywhere.

services.title: Toilet & Sink Installation
services.description: New fixtures installed right the first time. We clean up after ourselves and haul away the old stuff.

services.title: Kitchen Plumbing
services.description: Sink lines, garbage disposals, and those tricky under-cabinet connections that like to leak.

services.title: Leak Detection & Repair
services.description: High water bills? Hidden leaks? We'll find the problem and fix it without tearing up your whole house.

about.heading: The husband-wife team Macon trusts
about.body: Tim and Amanda are the faces behind Mr. Plumber. They've been fixing Macon's plumbing problems with honest pricing and careful work. No scratched cabinets, no forgotten messes — just professional service that treats your home like their own.

reviews.name: Regina R.
reviews.text: Justin installed my toilet and kitchen sink — super professional and left everything spotless. Even took the old boxes with him when he left.

reviews.name: Chris A.
reviews.text: Called about a busted pipe, they had someone here in an hour. Fixed fast and didn't break the bank. Definitely calling them again.

reviews.name: Mary H.
reviews.text: Tim and Amanda are the cutest plumbing team ever! Super fast work and went above and beyond to help reduce my water bill after a leak.

reviews.name: Debbie S.
reviews.text: Fixed my kitchen lines and handled a few other minor issues without charging extra. Really attentive to the small details.

service_areas.label: WHERE WE WORK
service_areas.heading: Serving Central Georgia
service_areas.subheading: Fast response times throughout the area

cta.heading: Ready to fix that plumbing problem?
cta.body: Don't let a small leak become a big headache. Call Tim and Amanda for honest estimates and fast, professional service.
